home.headline: Engineering humanitarian and development projects with field experience that creates real impact
home.intro: Civil engineer and senior project coordinator with more than 15 years of experience managing and delivering WASH, livelihoods, infrastructure, and donor reporting portfolios.

home.aboutTitle: Engineering expertise that creates sustainable humanitarian impact
home.aboutText: Ezaldeen Albadai combines rigorous engineering knowledge with a deep understanding of local communities, leading development and humanitarian projects from planning through final reporting with clarity and discipline.
